steps.title: Spot the explanation pattern
steps.content: The sentence asserts that Kaihalulu's sand is strikingly different, then explains why using though to contrast sources of typical sand color with this beach's sources. The punctuation after shade must signal that an explanation follows.

steps.title: Select the punctuation that introduces an explanation
steps.content:
A colon introduces an explanation or elaboration—so placing one after shade signals that the though-clause and independent clause that follow explain why the sand is different.

A comma doesn't signal this relationship, unnecessary punctuation in choice A disrupts the structure, and choice D's period incorrectly separates related clauses.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
